channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vatican Declares Society of St. Pius X in Schism, Excommunicates Bishops
item.description: The Vatican responded Thursday to a traditionalist group that consecrated bishops without papal approval, declaring the society in schism.

item.title: U.S. Healthcare System in Crisis; Supreme Court Ruling Could Worsen It
item.description: A high court ruling that may lead to mass deportations will impact hospitals and emergency rooms already under strain.

item.title: Federal civil rights data holds schools accountable. Under Trump, it's 6 months late
item.description: The Education Department has long collected civil rights data on issues like bullying, harassment, and disability services in schools, but it hasn't...

item.title: Going outside in this heat? Follow these guidelines to stay safe
item.description: Man, it's a hot one! Don't go out in this summer's heat wave before you arm yourself with these tips and a really big water bottle.
